contents.markdown:
# Video: 00:00.733 => 00:15.467
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:01.360 --> 00:06.640
<Speaker 1>When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

00:07.120 --> 00:13.320
<Speaker 2>To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

00:13.440 --> 00:23.680
<Speaker 1>We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.
```

Key Frames
- 00:00.733 ![](keyFrame.733.jpg)

- 00:09.800 ![](keyFrame.9800.jpg)
- 00:10.600 ![](keyFrame.10600.jpg)
- 00:12.100 ![](keyFrame.12100.jpg)
- 00:12.833 ![](keyFrame.12833.jpg)
- 00:14.200 ![](keyFrame.14200.jpg)
- 00:14.833 ![](keyFrame.14833.jpg)
- 00:15.467 ![](keyFrame.15467.jpg)

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a scenic aerial view of an island and displays the Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI logos. It then transitions to a person speaking about the importance of good data for neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology, mentioning the creation of a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and generate natural voices. Visuals include audio waveform displays and shots of data centers and server rooms, emphasizing the technology and infrastructure behind the TTS model.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 2
transcriptPhrases.text: To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

Summary.valueString: The video shifts to vibrant, detailed scenes from a flight simulator showing a biplane flying over coastal and mountainous landscapes, followed by a castle with a plane flying nearby. This showcases the realistic graphics and immersive experience of the flight simulation environment.

contents.markdown:
# Video: 00:23.100 => 00:43.233
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:24.040 --> 00:29.120
<Speaker 3>What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

00:29.600 --> 00:32.880
<Speaker 3>And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

00:33.680 --> 00:37.200
<Speaker 4>Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.

00:38.680 --> 00:41.280
<Speaker 4>9555 request to end pushback received.
```

Summary.valueString: The focus returns to a different person discussing the high fidelity of cognitive services offerings, emphasizing how these services produce voices that sound much more like actual human voices. The scene then transitions to airport ground operations, showing an airplane on the tarmac with ground crew directing pushback procedures, illustrating real-world aviation communication and operations.
